title: Pinned-Run Index
description: Machine-readable listing returned by invoke-list-pinned-runs.ps1. Maps pin names to the manifest paths agents need to read to inspect the pinned run's evidence.

pinName.description: Stable agent-chosen pin identifier. Validated against the same regex enforced by the pin operation.

manifestPath.description: Project-root-relative path to the pinned evidence-manifest.json, ready to pass to downstream tools.

scenarioId.description: Scenario identifier copied from the source evidence-manifest.

runId.description: Run identifier copied from the source evidence-manifest.

pinnedAt.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp the pin operation wrote this record.

status.description: Outcome taken from the pinned run-result.json; 'unknown' if the pinned directory predates this spec or lacks pin-metadata.json.

sourceInvokeScript.description: Orchestration script that produced the source run, copied from pin-metadata.json when available. Null for legacy/hand-created pins.
